hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"//;s/"$//'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q "api/generated/"; then echo "BLOCK: Files under api/generated/ are auto-generated by Orval and must not be edited manually. Run npm run api:sync instead."; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"//;s/"$//'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "Features/[^_][^/]+/(.*Service|.*Controller|.*Validator|.*Repository)\.cs$"; then FEATURE=$(echo "$FILE_PATH" | sed -n "s|.*Features/\([^/]*\)/.*|\1|p"); echo "Reminder: You edited a backend feature file in $FEATURE. If behavior changed, update the feature spec via the spec-sync agent."; fi; exit 0'
